'''Teles Jalahafi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]], whose home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Edan II/Legends|Edan II]]. The brother of [[Shela Jalahafi]], Teles Jalahafi served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a Dark Side adept, like his sister. However, Teles lacked his sister's strength in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], and continually showed that he was less powerful than her. After Shela was lost in an attack in [[Fortuna City]], Teles tracked the Rebel Alliance to the wreckage of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Last Hope (CR90 corvette)|''Last Hope'']], and perished in the confrontation.
